Duration of the check was **16 seconds**, compared to the required minimum of **45 seconds** for a full SOP-compliant screening. Guard patrol schedule adjusted.`,activity:[{id:`act-0138-1`,type:`created`,timestamp:`2026-05-19T09:15:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`19 May 2026, 09:15`,elapsed:`0m`,title:`Case created from event EVT-2026-0519-005`,description:`Manually escalated by Jon during morning shift review.`},{id:`act-0138-2`,type:`note`,timestamp:`2026-05-19T09:40:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`19 May 2026, 09:40`,elapsed:`25m`,title:`Note added by Jon`,description:`Recurring pattern in Concourse-B near Gate B7.
